channel.title: Milicsi
channel.description: Joornaal u go'ay farshaxanka, nolosha, iyo raadinta macnaha. Qoraallo ku saabsan falsafadda, akhlaaqda, iyo xikmadda.

item.title: Inta aan ku dhex jiray cilmiga xiddigiska (astronomy)
item.description: Astronomy, aayadaha Qur’aanka, Nuur iyo Siraaj, orbit-yada, iyo cosmology.

item.title: Dadku dan kama laha dabeecadda dhabta ah ee qofka
item.description: Machiavelli, muuqaalka dibadda, hoggaamiyaha, iyo doorashada u dhexeysa munaafaqnimo iyo daacadnimo.

item.title: Bani’aadamku inta badan ma dareemo khiyaanada uu ku nool yahay
item.description: Waqtigu waa hanti sii guuraysa; dib u dhigista, geerida, iyo jawaabta waqtiga.

item.title: Milyaneerrada dunida: tirakoob iyo macnaha
item.description: Qiyaastii 0.7% oo dadka ah ayaa milyaneer ah — tirakoob iyo macnaha.

item.title: UFC: miisaanka, divisions-ka, iyo habka dagaalka
item.description: Divisions, weigh-in, KO, submission — nidaamka UFC.

item.title: Oxygen waa sun kuu dileysa si tartiib tartiib ah
item.description: Neefta nolosha, oxidative stress, iyo xikmadda ku jirta in nolosha iyo dhimashadu ay yihiin laba weji oo hal neef ku dhex jira.

item.title: Possibility iyo probability: xisaabta nolosha
item.description: Farqiga u dhexeeya waxa suurtagal ah iyo waxa dhaca — qadar iyo nidaam.

item.title: Damacu iyo samirku: laba xoog oo is diidan
item.description: Al-Ghazali, Aayadda Naazi’aat, damac iyo samir.

item.title: Modernism iyo Islaamka
item.description: Taariikhda fikirka, jawaabta culimada, iyo jidka horumar diimeed.

item.title: Jaamacad ma aha aqoon
item.description: Degree iyo cilmiga dhabta ah — jir-dhiska iyo baraha bulshada.

item.title: Somalization: magac loo adeegsado dowlad fashilantay
item.description: Ereyga, Ciraaq, dib u celinta magaca.

item.title: Weli ma is weydiisay sababta aad u tahay jinsiga aad tahay?
item.description: Guurka, cibaadada, iyo laba jinsi ee Alle u abuuray.

item.title: Heshiiska Sacuudiga iyo Pakistan
item.description: Difaac, nukliyeer, iyo fikradda Muslim NATO.

item.title: Qalbiga Quraanka: micnaha erayga “qalb”
item.description: Maskax, ruux, dareen, iyo Qalbun Saleem.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17 iyo khasaaraha suuqa
item.description: Qiimaha saamiga, AI, iyo tartanka Samsung iyo Google.

item.title: Noloshu waa xaflad dhar-isku-ekaysi ah
item.description: Kafka, masraxa nolosha, iyo xorriyadda wejiga dhabta ah.

item.title: Dayax madoobaad iyo xaqiiqda
item.description: Xadiiska Muslim iyo cilmiga dabiiciga ah.

item.title: Certification iyo xirfadaha Soomaaliya
item.description: Hormuud, Premier Bank, iyo shahaado xirfadeed.

item.title: Leverage iyo afarta awood ee dunida
item.description: Labor, capital, media, iyo coding.

item.title: Adigoo PhD wata ayaad noqon kartaa doqon
item.description: Shahaado sare ma dammaanad qaaddo garasho. Aqoonta iyo xikmadda — farqiga u dhexeeya barasho iyo macne-raadinta.

item.title: Dhammaanteen dambiilayaal ayaan nahay
item.description: Dhexdeena yaa nadiif ah? Qoraal ku saabsan xukummada, naxariista, iyo is-garasho.
